scene.message: Yukino: {ctl0f:1}!{waitkey}{nl} Be careful...{waitkey}{ret}
Touch the orb of light?{nl} {ctl0e:0}{ret}
Ayase: Hey! What did you do,{nl} {ctl0f:1}!!{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: Whoa!!{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: What's this...?{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: What is it?{waitkey}I'm ready, if you mean{nl} mentally. Let's hurry!{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Pretty...{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: What now, after all{nl} this? Getting cold feet?{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: They say beautiful{nl} things have thorns.{waitkey}Be careful!{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: They say beautiful{nl} things have thorns.{waitkey}Be careful!{waitkey}{ret}
Received the "Phurba{nl} Dagger"!{waitkey}{ret}
Received the "Scorching{nl} Tablet"!{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Plasma, perhaps?{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Now, let's go!{waitkey}{ret}
Received the "Full Moon{nl} Tablet"!{waitkey}{ret}
